st.orm.Metamodel

Description

  • Uses of Metamodel in st.orm

    Subinterfaces of Metamodel in st.orm
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static interface 
    Metamodel.Key<T extends Data,E>
    Marker interface for metamodel fields that correspond to columns known to be unique.
    Classes in st.orm that implement Metamodel
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractKeyMetamodel<T extends Data,E,V>
    Extension of AbstractMetamodel that implements Metamodel.Key, indicating that the field has a uniqueness constraint.
    class 
    AbstractMetamodel<T extends Data,E,V>
    Implementation that is used by the generated models.
    static final record 
    Metamodel.KeyDelegate<T extends Data,E>
    Delegating wrapper that adds the Metamodel.Key marker to an existing Metamodel instance.
    Methods in st.orm that return Metamodel
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default Metamodel<? extends Data,E>
    Metamodel.canonical()
    Returns the canonical metamodel for the field represented by this metamodel.
    Metamodel<T,E>
    Metamodel.KeyDelegate.delegate()
    Returns the value of the delegate record component.
    Metamodel<?,?>
    Pageable.Order.field()
    Returns the value of the field record component.
    static <T extends Data, E>
    Metamodel<T,E>
    Metamodel.of(Class<T> rootTable, String path)
    Creates a new metamodel for the given root rootTable and path.
    static <T extends Data>
    Metamodel<T,T>
    Metamodel.root(Class<T> table)
    Creates a new metamodel for the given record type.
    Metamodel<T,? extends Data>
    AbstractMetamodel.table()
    Returns the table that holds the column to which this metamodel is pointing.
    Metamodel<T,? extends Data>
    Metamodel.KeyDelegate.table()
     
    Metamodel<T,? extends Data>
    Metamodel.table()
    Returns the table that holds the column to which this metamodel is pointing.

    Method
    Description
    default List<Metamodel<T,?>>
    Metamodel.flatten()
    Returns a flat list of leaf metamodels for this metamodel.
    List<Metamodel<T,?>>
    Metamodel.KeyDelegate.flatten()
     
    Methods in st.orm with parameters of type Metamodel
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <T extends Data, E>
    Metamodel.Key<T,E>
    Metamodel.key(Metamodel<T,E> metamodel)
    Returns a Key view of the given metamodel.
    Pageable
    Pageable.sortBy(Metamodel<?,?> field)
    Returns a new pageable with an ascending sort order appended for the given field.
    Pageable
    Pageable.sortByDescending(Metamodel<?,?> field)
    Returns a new pageable with a descending sort order appended for the given field.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    AbstractKeyMetamodel(Class<E> fieldType, String path, String field, boolean inline, Metamodel<T,?> parent)

    Constructs a key metamodel with explicit column and nullable flags.

  • Uses of Metamodel in st.orm.core.repository

    Methods in st.orm.core.repository with parameters of type Metamodel
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default <V, S> Slice<E>
    EntityRepository.slice(Metamodel.Key<E,V> key, Metamodel<E,S> sort, int size)
    Returns the first slice of entities ordered by a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.
    default <V, S> Slice<P>
    ProjectionRepository.slice(Metamodel.Key<P,V> key, Metamodel<P,S> sort, int size)
    Returns the first slice of projections ordered by a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.
    default <V extends Data, S>
    Slice<E>
    EntityRepository.sliceAfter(Metamodel.Key<E,V> key, Ref<V> keyAfter, Metamodel<E,S> sort, S sortAfter, int size)
    Returns the next slice of entities after the specified composite cursor with a ref unique key, using a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.
    default <V, S> Slice<E>
    EntityRepository.sliceAfter(Metamodel.Key<E,V> key, V keyAfter, Metamodel<E,S> sort, S sortAfter, int size)
    Returns the next slice of entities after the specified composite cursor, using a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.
    default <V extends Data, S>
    Slice<P>
    ProjectionRepository.sliceAfter(Metamodel.Key<P,V> key, Ref<V> keyAfter, Metamodel<P,S> sort, S sortAfter, int size)
    Returns the next slice of projections after the specified composite cursor with a ref unique key, using a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.
    default <V, S> Slice<P>
    ProjectionRepository.sliceAfter(Metamodel.Key<P,V> key, V keyAfter, Metamodel<P,S> sort, S sortAfter, int size)
    Returns the next slice of projections after the specified composite cursor, using a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.
    default <V extends Data, S>
    Slice<Ref<E>>
    EntityRepository.sliceAfterRef(Metamodel.Key<E,V> key, Ref<V> keyAfter, Metamodel<E,S> sort, S sortAfter, int size)
    Returns the next slice of entity refs after the specified composite cursor with a ref unique key, using a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.
    default <V, S> Slice<Ref<E>>
    EntityRepository.sliceAfterRef(Metamodel.Key<E,V> key, V keyAfter, Metamodel<E,S> sort, S sortAfter, int size)
    Returns the next slice of entity refs after the specified composite cursor, using a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.
    default <V extends Data, S>
    Slice<Ref<P>>
    ProjectionRepository.sliceAfterRef(Metamodel.Key<P,V> key, Ref<V> keyAfter, Metamodel<P,S> sort, S sortAfter, int size)
    Returns the next slice of projection refs after the specified composite cursor with a ref unique key, using a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.
    default <V, S> Slice<Ref<P>>
    ProjectionRepository.sliceAfterRef(Metamodel.Key<P,V> key, V keyAfter, Metamodel<P,S> sort, S sortAfter, int size)
    Returns the next slice of projection refs after the specified composite cursor, using a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.
    default <V, S> Slice<E>
    EntityRepository.sliceBefore(Metamodel.Key<E,V> key, Metamodel<E,S> sort, int size)
    Returns the first slice of entities ordered by a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker, both in descending order.
    default <V extends Data, S>
    Slice<E>
    EntityRepository.sliceBefore(Metamodel.Key<E,V> key, Ref<V> keyBefore, Metamodel<E,S> sort, S sortBefore, int size)
    Returns the previous slice of entities before the specified composite cursor with a ref unique key, using a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.
    default <V, S> Slice<E>
    EntityRepository.sliceBefore(Metamodel.Key<E,V> key, V keyBefore, Metamodel<E,S> sort, S sortBefore, int size)
    Returns the previous slice of entities before the specified composite cursor, using a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.
    default <V, S> Slice<P>
    ProjectionRepository.sliceBefore(Metamodel.Key<P,V> key, Metamodel<P,S> sort, int size)
    Returns the first slice of projections ordered by a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker, both in descending order.
    default <V extends Data, S>
    Slice<P>
    ProjectionRepository.sliceBefore(Metamodel.Key<P,V> key, Ref<V> keyBefore, Metamodel<P,S> sort, S sortBefore, int size)
    Returns the previous slice of projections before the specified composite cursor with a ref unique key, using a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.
    default <V, S> Slice<P>
    ProjectionRepository.sliceBefore(Metamodel.Key<P,V> key, V keyBefore, Metamodel<P,S> sort, S sortBefore, int size)
    Returns the previous slice of projections before the specified composite cursor, using a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.
    default <V, S> Slice<Ref<E>>
    EntityRepository.sliceBeforeRef(Metamodel.Key<E,V> key, Metamodel<E,S> sort, int size)

    Methods in st.orm.core.repository.impl that return types with arguments of type Metamodel
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected Optional<Set<Metamodel<?,?>>>
    EntityRepositoryImpl.getDirty(E entity, EntityCache<E,ID> cache)
    Returns the dirty fields of the entity, an empty set if all fields must be regarded as dirty, or an empty optional if the entity is not dirty.

    Modifier and Type
    Method

    Method
    Description

    Column.metamodel()
    Returns the metamodel for this element.

    Column.secondaryMetamodel()
    Returns the secondary metamodel associated with this element.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<Metamodel<E,?>>
    Model.findMetamodel(Class<? extends Data> type)
    Finds a unique metamodel referring to the given entity type.
    Optional<Metamodel<E,ID>>
    Model.getPrimaryKeyMetamodel()
    Returns the metamodel of the primary key, if present.
    Methods in st.orm.core.template with parameters of type Metamodel
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Element
    Templates.column(Metamodel<?,?> field)
    Generates a column element for a column specified by the given field in a type safe manner.
    static Element
    Templates.column(Metamodel<?,?> field, ResolveScope scope)
    Generates a column element for a column specified by the given field in a type safe manner.
    void
    Model.forEachValue(Metamodel<E,?> metamodel, Object object, BiConsumer<Column,Object> consumer)
    Extracts values for a given metamodel and object.
    List<Column>
    Model.getColumns(Metamodel<?,?> metamodel)
    Resolves all columns associated with the given metamodel.
    default Column
    Model.getSingleColumn(Metamodel<?,?> metamodel)
    Resolves a single column for the given metamodel.
    final QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>
    QueryBuilder.groupBy(Metamodel<T,?>... path)
    Adds a GROUP BY clause to the query for field at the specified path in the table graph.
    final QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>
    QueryBuilder.groupByAny(Metamodel<?,?>... path)
    Adds a GROUP BY clause to the query for field at the specified path in the table graph.
    final <V> QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>
    QueryBuilder.having(Metamodel<T,V> path, Operator operator, V... o)
    Adds a HAVING clause to the query using the specified expression.
    final <V> QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>
    QueryBuilder.havingAny(Metamodel<?,V> path, Operator operator, V... o)
    Adds a HAVING clause to the query using the specified expression.
    final QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>
    QueryBuilder.orderBy(Metamodel<T,?>... path)
    Adds an ORDER BY clause to the query for the field at the specified path in the table graph.
    final QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>
    QueryBuilder.orderByAny(Metamodel<?,?>... path)
    Adds an ORDER BY clause to the query for the field at the specified path in the table graph or manually added joins.
    final QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>
    QueryBuilder.orderByDescending(Metamodel<T,?> path)
    Adds an ORDER BY clause to the query for the field at the specified path in the table graph.
    final QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>
    QueryBuilder.orderByDescending(Metamodel<T,?>... path)
    Adds an ORDER BY clause to the query for the fields at the specified paths in the table graph.
    final QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>
    QueryBuilder.orderByDescendingAny(Metamodel<?,?> path)
    Adds an ORDER BY clause to the query for the field at the specified path in the table graph or manually added joins.
    final QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>
    QueryBuilder.orderByDescendingAny(Metamodel<?,?>... path)
    Adds an ORDER BY clause to the query for the fields at the specified paths in the table graph or manually added joins.
    final <E, S> Slice<R>
    QueryBuilder.slice(Metamodel.Key<T,E> key, Metamodel<T,S> sort, int size)
    Executes the query and returns the first Slice of results for composite keyset pagination, sorting by a non-unique column (sort) with a unique tiebreaker (key) in ascending order.
    final <E, S> Slice<R>
    QueryBuilder.sliceAfter(Metamodel.Key<T,E> key, E keyAfter, Metamodel<T,S> sort, S sortAfter, int size)
    Executes the query and returns the next Slice of results after the specified composite cursor, sorting by a non-unique column (sort) with a unique tiebreaker (key) in ascending order.
    final <V extends Data, S>
    Slice<R>
    QueryBuilder.sliceAfter(Metamodel.Key<T,V> key, Ref<V> keyAfter, Metamodel<T,S> sort, S sortAfter, int size)
    Executes the query and returns the next Slice of results after the specified composite cursor with a ref-based unique key, sorting by a non-unique column (sort) with a unique tiebreaker (key) in ascending order.
    final <E, S> Slice<R>
    QueryBuilder.sliceBefore(Metamodel.Key<T,E> key, E keyBefore, Metamodel<T,S> sort, S sortBefore, int size)
    Executes the query and returns the previous Slice of results before the specified composite cursor, sorting by a non-unique column (sort) with a unique tiebreaker (key) in descending order.
    final <E, S> Slice<R>
    QueryBuilder.sliceBefore(Metamodel.Key<T,E> key, Metamodel<T,S> sort, int size)
    Executes the query and returns the first Slice of results for composite keyset pagination, sorting by a non-unique column (sort) with a unique tiebreaker (key) in descending order.
    final <V extends Data, S>
    Slice<R>
    QueryBuilder.sliceBefore(Metamodel.Key<T,V> key, Ref<V> keyBefore, Metamodel<T,S> sort, S sortBefore, int size)
    Executes the query and returns the previous Slice of results before the specified composite cursor with a ref-based unique key, sorting by a non-unique column (sort) with a unique tiebreaker (key) in descending order.
    final <V extends Data>
    QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>
    QueryBuilder.where(Metamodel<T,V> path, Iterable<V> it)
    Adds a WHERE clause that matches the specified records.
    final <V> QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>
    QueryBuilder.where(Metamodel<T,V> path, Operator operator, Iterable<? extends V> it)
    Adds a WHERE clause that matches the specified objects at the specified path in the table graph.

    QueryBuilder.where(Metamodel<T,V> path, Operator operator, V... o)
    Adds a WHERE clause that matches the specified objects at the specified path in the table graph.

    QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>
    QueryBuilder.where(Metamodel<T,V> path, V record)

    ColumnImpl(Name columnName, int index, Class<?> type, boolean primaryKey, GenerationStrategy generation, String sequence, boolean foreignKey, int keyIndex, boolean nullable, boolean insertable, boolean updatable, boolean version, boolean ref, Metamodel<Data,?> metamodel, Metamodel<Data,?> secondaryMetamodel)
    Creates an instance of a ColumnImpl record class.

  • Uses of Metamodel in st.orm.repository

    Methods in st.orm.repository with parameters of type Metamodel
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <V, S> Slice<E>
    EntityRepository.slice(Metamodel.Key<E,V> key, Metamodel<E,S> sort, int size)
    Returns the first slice of entities ordered by a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.
    <V, S> Slice<P>
    ProjectionRepository.slice(Metamodel.Key<P,V> key, Metamodel<P,S> sort, int size)
    Returns the first slice of projections ordered by a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.
    <V extends Data, S>
    Slice<E>
    EntityRepository.sliceAfter(Metamodel.Key<E,V> key, Ref<V> keyAfter, Metamodel<E,S> sort, S sortAfter, int size)
    Returns the next slice of entities after the specified composite cursor with a ref unique key, using a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.
    <V, S> Slice<E>
    EntityRepository.sliceAfter(Metamodel.Key<E,V> key, V keyAfter, Metamodel<E,S> sort, S sortAfter, int size)
    Returns the next slice of entities after the specified composite cursor, using a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.
    <V extends Data, S>
    Slice<P>
    ProjectionRepository.sliceAfter(Metamodel.Key<P,V> key, Ref<V> keyAfter, Metamodel<P,S> sort, S sortAfter, int size)
    Returns the next slice of projections after the specified composite cursor with a ref unique key, using a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.
    <V, S> Slice<P>
    ProjectionRepository.sliceAfter(Metamodel.Key<P,V> key, V keyAfter, Metamodel<P,S> sort, S sortAfter, int size)
    Returns the next slice of projections after the specified composite cursor, using a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.
    <V extends Data, S>
    Slice<Ref<E>>
    EntityRepository.sliceAfterRef(Metamodel.Key<E,V> key, Ref<V> keyAfter, Metamodel<E,S> sort, S sortAfter, int size)
    Returns the next slice of entity refs after the specified composite cursor with a ref unique key, using a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.
    <V, S> Slice<Ref<E>>
    EntityRepository.sliceAfterRef(Metamodel.Key<E,V> key, V keyAfter, Metamodel<E,S> sort, S sortAfter, int size)
    Returns the next slice of entity refs after the specified composite cursor, using a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.
    <V extends Data, S>
    Slice<Ref<P>>
    ProjectionRepository.sliceAfterRef(Metamodel.Key<P,V> key, Ref<V> keyAfter, Metamodel<P,S> sort, S sortAfter, int size)
    Returns the next slice of projection refs after the specified composite cursor with a ref unique key, using a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.
    <V, S> Slice<Ref<P>>
    ProjectionRepository.sliceAfterRef(Metamodel.Key<P,V> key, V keyAfter, Metamodel<P,S> sort, S sortAfter, int size)
    Returns the next slice of projection refs after the specified composite cursor, using a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.
    <V, S> Slice<E>
    EntityRepository.sliceBefore(Metamodel.Key<E,V> key, Metamodel<E,S> sort, int size)
    Returns the first slice of entities ordered by a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker, both in descending order.
    <V extends Data, S>
    Slice<E>
    EntityRepository.sliceBefore(Metamodel.Key<E,V> key, Ref<V> keyBefore, Metamodel<E,S> sort, S sortBefore, int size)
    Returns the previous slice of entities before the specified composite cursor with a ref unique key, using a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.
    <V, S> Slice<E>
    EntityRepository.sliceBefore(Metamodel.Key<E,V> key, V keyBefore, Metamodel<E,S> sort, S sortBefore, int size)
    Returns the previous slice of entities before the specified composite cursor, using a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    Generates a column element for a column specified by the given metamodel in a type safe manner.
    static Element
    Templates.column(Metamodel<?,?> path, ResolveScope scope)
    Generates a column element for a column specified by the given metamodel in a type safe manner.
    final QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>
    QueryBuilder.groupBy(Metamodel<T,?>... path)
    Adds a GROUP BY clause to the query for field at the specified path in the table graph.
    final QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>
    QueryBuilder.groupByAny(Metamodel<?,?>... path)
    Adds a GROUP BY clause to the query for field at the specified path in the table graph.
    final <V> QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>
    QueryBuilder.having(Metamodel<T,V> path, Operator operator, V... o)
    Adds a HAVING clause to the query using the specified expression.
    final <V> QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>
    QueryBuilder.havingAny(Metamodel<?,V> path, Operator operator, V... o)
    Adds a HAVING clause to the query using the specified expression.
    final QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>
    QueryBuilder.orderBy(Metamodel<T,?>... path)
    Adds an ORDER BY clause to the query for the field at the specified path in the table graph.
    final QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>
    QueryBuilder.orderByAny(Metamodel<?,?>... path)
    Adds an ORDER BY clause to the query for the field at the specified path in the table graph or manually added joins.
    final QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>
    QueryBuilder.orderByDescending(Metamodel<T,?> path)
    Adds an ORDER BY clause to the query for the field at the specified path in the table graph.
    final QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>
    QueryBuilder.orderByDescending(Metamodel<T,?>... path)
    Adds an ORDER BY clause to the query for the fields at the specified paths in the table graph.
    final QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>
    QueryBuilder.orderByDescendingAny(Metamodel<?,?> path)
    Adds an ORDER BY clause to the query for the field at the specified path in the table graph or manually added joins.
    final QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>
    QueryBuilder.orderByDescendingAny(Metamodel<?,?>... path)
    Adds an ORDER BY clause to the query for the fields at the specified paths in the table graph or manually added joins.
    final <E, S> Slice<R>
    QueryBuilder.slice(Metamodel.Key<T,E> key, Metamodel<T,S> sort, int size)
    Executes the query and returns the first Slice of results using composite keyset pagination with two columns: a non-unique sort for ordering and a unique key as a tiebreaker.
    final <E, S> Slice<R>
    QueryBuilder.sliceAfter(Metamodel.Key<T,E> key, E keyAfter, Metamodel<T,S> sort, S sortAfter, int size)
    Executes the query and returns the next Slice of results after the specified composite cursor using two-column keyset pagination: a non-unique sort for ordering and a unique key as a tiebreaker.
    final <V extends Data, S>
    Slice<R>
    QueryBuilder.sliceAfter(Metamodel.Key<T,V> key, Ref<V> keyAfter, Metamodel<T,S> sort, S sortAfter, int size)
    Executes the query and returns the next Slice of results after the specified composite cursor using two-column keyset pagination with a ref-typed unique key: a non-unique sort for ordering and a unique key as a tiebreaker.
    final <E, S> Slice<R>
    QueryBuilder.sliceBefore(Metamodel.Key<T,E> key, E keyBefore, Metamodel<T,S> sort, S sortBefore, int size)
    Executes the query and returns the previous Slice of results before the specified composite cursor using two-column keyset pagination: a non-unique sort for ordering and a unique key as a tiebreaker.
    final <E, S> Slice<R>
    QueryBuilder.sliceBefore(Metamodel.Key<T,E> key, Metamodel<T,S> sort, int size)
    Executes the query and returns the first Slice of results for composite keyset pagination, sorting by a non-unique column (sort) with a unique tiebreaker (key) in descending order.
    final <V extends Data, S>
    Slice<R>
    QueryBuilder.sliceBefore(Metamodel.Key<T,V> key, Ref<V> keyBefore, Metamodel<T,S> sort, S sortBefore, int size)
    Executes the query and returns the previous Slice of results before the specified composite cursor using two-column keyset pagination with a ref-typed unique key: a non-unique sort for ordering and a unique key as a tiebreaker.
    final <V extends Data>
    QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>
    QueryBuilder.where(Metamodel<T,V> path, Iterable<V> it)
    Adds a WHERE clause that matches the specified records.
    final <V> QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>
    QueryBuilder.where(Metamodel<T,V> path, Operator operator, Iterable<? extends V> it)
    Adds a WHERE clause that matches the specified objects at the specified path in the table graph.

    QueryBuilder.where(Metamodel<T,V> path, Operator operator, V... o)
    Adds a WHERE clause that matches the specified objects at the specified path in the table graph.
